name: team-task-manager
description: Team Task Manager — full-stack hiring assessment build (Express + React + Prisma + Postgres).

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client ci && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server ci && npm --prefix server run generate && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.start: npm --prefix server run migrate:deploy && node server/dist/index.js
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
